lint.note: golangci-lint typecheck linter reports false positives due to Go 1.26 runtime vs golangci-lint 1.64.5 (built with Go 1.24) version mismatch. These errors are pre-existing and exist on all commits including before ci-fixes. gofmt, go vet, and all other linters pass cleanly on mission files. The false positives are from standard library and dependency files, not project code.

appliedUpdates.description: Added golangci-lint version/compatibility note to environment.md documenting the Go 1.26 vs golangci-lint 1.64.5 typecheck false positive issue and installation path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an exception to the TDD step (Step 3) for refactoring/cleanup tasks where writing tests before implementation doesn't apply. The skill currently says 'Write Tests FIRST (Red)' but for dead-code removal and lint fixes there are no new tests to write — only obsolete code to remove.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature lint-cleanup-and-dead-code correctly skipped the TDD step because it was removing dead code and fixing formatting, not adding new behavior.
